emails.subject: FW: Carr Futures
emails.body: Stephanie: Scroll all the way down to Sheila's original message for contact person and the two Enron companies being guaranteed. You will need to verify with London that ECTRIC has a futures agreement with Carr (maybe you can get a copy of it for our records). Can you prepare a draft guaranty and ask Tanya for a cap. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: FW: Carr Futures
emails.body: Sara, I have tracked down James Canney in London, who works with ECTRIC's brokerage/futures matters. They do have an agreement with Carr, but do not have a copy of the agreement. He is trying to get a copy from Carr.
